requirement_topic.en: Electrical Product Safety — WorkSafe / Energy Safety and Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010
requirement_topic.zh: 电气产品安全——WorkSafe / Energy Safety 与《2010年电气（安全）条例》
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣產品安全——WorkSafe / Energy Safety 與《2010年電氣（安全）規例》

summary.en: Everyone who manufactures, imports, supplies, retails, or trades electrical appliances or fittings in New Zealand must ensure products comply with New Zealand's electrical safety framework. WorkSafe guidance states that recognised safety standards, normally NZS or AS/NZS, and recognised test reports are needed for products to be recognised as safe. High-risk and medium-risk products may require approval and/or a Supplier Declaration of Conformity before supply.
summary.zh: 在新西兰制造、进口、供应、零售或交易电气器具或配件的任何人，均须确保产品符合新西兰电气安全框架。WorkSafe 指引说明，通常需要符合 NZS 或 AS/NZS 等认可安全标准，并具备认可测试报告，产品才会被视为安全。高风险和中风险产品在供应前可能需要批准和/或供应商符合性声明（SDoC）。
summary.zht: 在紐西蘭製造、進口、供應、零售或交易電氣器具或配件的任何人，均須確保產品符合紐西蘭電氣安全框架。WorkSafe 指引說明，通常需要符合 NZS 或 AS/NZS 等認可安全標準，並具備認可測試報告，產品才會被視為安全。高風險和中風險產品在供應前可能需要批准和/或供應商符合性聲明（SDoC）。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 62109-1 / AS/NZS 62109-2 — PV power converter safety
AS/NZS 3820 — Essential safety requirements for electrical equipment

summary.en: China domestic documentation may include voluntary CQC certification, GB/T 37408 reports, NB/T 32004 reports, IEC 62109 CB reports, or factory declarations. PV inverters are generally not treated as CCC mandatory products, and Chinese domestic documents do not by themselves establish compliance with New Zealand's Electricity (Safety) Regulations.
summary.zh: 中国国内文件可能包括 CQC 自愿认证、GB/T 37408 报告、NB/T 32004 报告、IEC 62109 CB 报告或工厂声明。光伏逆变器通常不属于 CCC 强制产品，中国国内文件本身不能证明符合新西兰《电气（安全）条例》。
summary.zht: 中國國內文件可能包括 CQC 自願認證、GB/T 37408 報告、NB/T 32004 報告、IEC 62109 CB 報告或工廠聲明。光伏逆變器通常不屬於 CCC 強制產品，中國國內文件本身不能證明符合紐西蘭《電氣（安全）規例》。

gap.en: The importer or NZ supplier must map available China/IEC evidence to New Zealand-recognised AS/NZS safety requirements, keep test reports, provide English instructions, and ensure any declared-article approval or SDoC obligation is satisfied before supply. China domestic certificates are not a market-access decision by WorkSafe.
gap.zh: 进口商或新西兰供应商须将现有中国/IEC 证明映射到新西兰认可的 AS/NZS 安全要求，保存测试报告，提供英文说明书，并在供应前满足任何申报产品批准或 SDoC 义务。中国国内证书不是 WorkSafe 的市场准入决定。
gap.zht: 進口商或紐西蘭供應商須將現有中國/IEC 證明映射到紐西蘭認可的 AS/NZS 安全要求，保存測試報告，提供英文說明書，並在供應前滿足任何申報產品批准或 SDoC 義務。中國國內證書不是 WorkSafe 的市場准入決定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical products must be safe and comply with the Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010 before supply
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certification does not replace NZ supplier obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A New Zealand importer or supplier must hold NZ-recognised safety evidence and satisfy WorkSafe/Energy Safety obligations; China domestic PV inverter reports are supporting evidence only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新西兰进口商或供应商必须持有新西兰认可的安全证明并满足 WorkSafe/Energy Safety 义务；中国国内光伏逆变器报告只能作为辅助证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 紐西蘭進口商或供應商必須持有紐西蘭認可的安全證明並滿足 WorkSafe/Energy Safety 義務；中國國內光伏逆變器報告只能作為輔助證明。

requirement_topic.en: RCM / EESS Use in New Zealand — Not the Same as Australia
requirement_topic.zh: 新西兰 RCM / EESS 使用——不同于澳大利亚
requirement_topic.zht: 紐西蘭 RCM / EESS 使用——不同於澳洲

summary.en: WorkSafe describes the RCM as a voluntary mark for New Zealand electrical products that can show compliance with applicable electrical safety and EMC requirements, but New Zealand and Australia have different regulatory requirements. Declared articles remain subject to approval, recognised certification, or SDoC requirements as applicable. WorkSafe's 2023 declared-article guidance also notes that for certain Level 3 EESS / NSW-approved declared articles, certification must verify suitability for New Zealand, and the RCM alone is not recognised as the unique certification marking for that purpose.
summary.zh: WorkSafe 将 RCM 描述为新西兰电气产品可自愿使用的标志，用以表示符合适用电气安全和 EMC 要求，但新西兰与澳大利亚监管要求不同。申报产品仍须按适用情况满足批准、认可认证或 SDoC 要求。WorkSafe 2023 年申报产品指引还指出，对某些 Level 3 EESS / NSW 批准的申报产品，认证必须验证其适用于新西兰，且 RCM 本身不被认可为该用途的唯一认证标识。
summary.zht: WorkSafe 將 RCM 描述為紐西蘭電氣產品可自願使用的標誌，用以表示符合適用電氣安全和 EMC 要求，但紐西蘭與澳洲監管要求不同。申報產品仍須按適用情況滿足批准、認可認證或 SDoC 要求。WorkSafe 2023 年申報產品指引還指出，對某些 Level 3 EESS / NSW 批准的申報產品，認證必須驗證其適用於紐西蘭，且 RCM 本身不被認可為該用途的唯一認證標識。

summary.en: China has no RCM equivalent. CCC, CQC, GB/T, or manufacturer marks do not establish RCM user registration, EESS evidence, NZ suitability, or declared-article status.
summary.zh: 中国没有 RCM 等效标志。CCC、CQC、GB/T 或制造商标志不能证明 RCM 用户注册、EESS 证据、新西兰适用性或申报产品状态。
summary.zht: 中國沒有 RCM 等效標誌。CCC、CQC、GB/T 或製造商標誌不能證明 RCM 用戶登記、EESS 證據、紐西蘭適用性或申報產品狀態。

standards_or_laws: No China domestic equivalent to RCM user registration

gap.en: Do not copy the Australian EESS/RCM pathway without checking New Zealand suitability. The NZ supplier must determine whether the inverter is a declared high-risk or medium-risk article, whether approval, certification, or SDoC applies, whether EESS evidence includes NZ variations, and whether the RCM is being used lawfully.
gap.zh: 不应不经核查就复制澳大利亚 EESS/RCM 路径。新西兰供应商须判断该逆变器是否为申报高风险或中风险产品，是否适用批准、认证或 SDoC，EESS 证据是否包含新西兰差异，以及 RCM 使用是否合法。
gap.zht: 不應不經核查就複製澳洲 EESS/RCM 路徑。紐西蘭供應商須判斷該逆變器是否為申報高風險或中風險產品，是否適用批准、認證或 SDoC，EESS 證據是否包含紐西蘭差異，以及 RCM 使用是否合法。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — RCM use is voluntary in NZ but must be lawful; declared-article approval, certification, or SDoC obligations may be mandatory

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RCM/EESS evidence can be useful for New Zealand, but it must be checked for NZ suitability and does not erase declared-article approval or SDoC obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RCM/EESS 证明对新西兰可能有用，但必须核查其适用于新西兰，且不能免除申报产品批准或 SDoC 义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RCM/EESS 證明對紐西蘭可能有用，但必須核查其適用於紐西蘭，且不能免除申報產品批准或 SDoC 義務。
